Priority.description: Priority of the option. If several enabled options within the group define conflicting files or manipulations, the highest priority wins.

Id.description: A unique identifier to reference this option within this mod.

Layout.description: Additional flags to control this options layout behaviour when drawn.

Condition.description: Conditions on the full settings of this mod to control whether this option is visible and applied.

Color.description: A color to use for the label of this option, mapped to 8 user-customizable colors. 0 means normal text color.
